ground_truth.title: International travel medical insurance and travel protection | UnitedHealthcare
ground_truth.main_content: With SafeTrip travel protection plans from UnitedHealthcare Global, you can set off on your next adventure prepared and ready for what comes your way — whether that's medical, emergency or trip cancellation surprises. Choose the right SafeTrip travel medical insurance or travel protection plan for you, with plans that include medical coverage, trip cancellation, evacuation and other coverage options. International travel medical insurance is secondary emergency coverage for people who are leaving their home country and provides coverage while they are outside of their country, whether that's for a trip, work outside the country, a volunteer trip or any other travel circumstance. International travel medical insurance typically offers benefits that cover emergency medical, dental and evacuation services. Some plans, like those with added travel protection benefits, cover specific travel-related circumstances, like trip cancellation, trip interruptions or lost baggage. With travel medical insurance and travel protection, you'll have coverage to help protect your financial investment — and your health and safety. It's your ticket to help you travel with less stress. Our travel protection plans offer flexible benefits for any voyage — from bucket-list trips to out-of-country work and more. These 3 plan choices include coverage for everything from trip delays and cancellations to unexpected health care needs and helpful details like destination profiles and evacuation coverage. International Travel Medical Plus provides a combination plan that covers unexpected medical needs and unanticipated trip cancellations with no deductibles, trip cancellation, interruption, delay and baggage coverage, medical and security assistance, and option to add Extreme Sports and Rental car coverage. International Travel Medical offers emergency medical insurance for travel with no deductibles, up to $1 million for medical expense limit, medical evacuation and medical assistance, and option to add Extreme Sports coverage. Travel Protection provides coverage for domestic U.S. trip cancellations, interruptions and delays with no deductibles, trip cancellation, interruption, delay and baggage coverage, Full AD&D coverage, and option to add Rental car coverage. Nearly every traveler can benefit from the extra protection of travel medical insurance including families with children, anyone visiting a country that speaks a different language, solo travelers, and travelers to a remote location. Many health insurance plans do not cover you when you are out of the country, and for those that do, the coverage is often limited and requires you to pay at the time of service, save receipts and file for reimbursement once you get home. Travel medical insurance plans typically cover emergency medical and dental costs, emergency transportation costs such as ambulance or air lift, and emergency evacuations that would get you from a remote location to appropriate medical care.
